text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder keeps her word during the Asahi
Hai Futurity Stakes. In fact, she outdoes herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is electric. They all appear to be
singing her praises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But in reality...

text_block_list.name: Child in the Stands
text_block_list.text:
Wooow... Hey, Dad, was that the new "beast"
lookalike everyone's been talking about?

text_block_list.name: Seasoned Fan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes. That kind of performance reminds me of
Maruzensky when she was in her junior year.

text_block_list.name: Seasoned Fan
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget how the crowd roared when she
set that record.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Now that's what I call a race! Tomorrow's article will practically write itself!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I better get a good picture to go along with it!
Oh! I know! I can pair it with an old picture of
Maruzensky. The readers will eat that up!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should have expected this. In my head, I knew it
was coming.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But now that it's actually happening...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... pardon me. Everything is fine, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's just...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's shadow... looms much larger than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I explored every possible avenue in my
preparations and held nothing back in my pursuit
of victory.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And yet, all they call me is the new Maruzensky.
All they see is an echo of that hotrod-red streak.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I won't stand for it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Following in her footsteps will only keep me
beneath her shadow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In which case, I have but one option.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I must face her directly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder silently nods, her eyes ablaze.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Determination. That is what I swore to uphold.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'd be fortunate to so much as scratch the surface
of her abilities, so we'll have to pull out all the
stops.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That means remaining as diligent as possible
throughout the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby in particular is
non-negotiable, as it will determine the face of
my generation.
choice_data_list: Sounds like it's our next objective, then!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Where there's a will, there's a way. No matter how grand she may be... I will surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Derby has become our first goal in
preparing for a showdown with Maruzensky!
